,"book_info":{"abstract":"【神豪】【无脑爽】【日常】【多女主】
“我希望我是一个超级富二代，二十二年的穷酸生活只是我那未曾蒙面的首富父亲为了磨练我的心智，好让我当一个合格的继承者而已！
2024年，5月14日，23点45分。”
在这个即将睡下的夜晚，江南照常拿起了一个日记本，记录下了自己长达五年的一个愿望。
……
第二天起床洗漱，看着镜子里棱角分明，帅的掉渣，还带有完美人鱼线无敌身材的自己，江南愣住了。
“叮！”
“恭喜宿主，成功绑定肆意人生系统！”
在脑海中响起来了传说中系统的提示音之时，网恋许久的女友也打来电话：达令，这个周末我会过来陪你过520哟~","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/30c239290bb57a3cd73776af24f95e49","author":"蛋迷十五","author_id":"","book_id":"7427064073323301950","book_name":"开局许愿成真，我成长生流神豪","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8c070","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7427361167917449790","read_count":"28838","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1008015"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"491","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,神豪,多女主,无脑爽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a5c1df7b694e28a4509a8e1faffdc376~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779390113&x-signature=ZOwbq0jtyfyzWN77OGMdWjzuTVM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2897948997072205","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"69"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032303015366B809F009F749A062B5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count"
